cot_prefix: Okay, let's think about this problem. I need to determine if following a series of movements will bring me back to my starting point. First, I'm supposed to always face forward. So my direction doesn't change during these steps. Now, let's track my movements step by step: 1. Start at position 0. 2. Take 5 steps backward. That would put me at position -5. 3. Take 8 steps forward. Moving from -5 to +3. 4. Take 7 steps forward. Moving from +3 to +10. 5. Take 5 steps backward. Moving from +10 to +5. So
